queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of having no checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical investigation into how critical or multiple existing credit accounts correlate with reduced credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical study on the protective effect of negative checking account balances on loan default likelihood.
